content:
**Brief Answer**  
For urgent care visits under this **PPO** plan, urgent care is covered both at **freestanding urgent care centers** and when received in a **hospital outpatient setting** (facility and/or professional charges), but the member will pay different cost shares depending on where the urgent care is provided and whether the provider is in-network.  

---
**Detailed Explanation**

### A) Urgent Care – Freestanding outpatient facility (facility charges)
**In-Network Provider**  
For in-network providers:  
the plan has a **$750** deductible per person, not to exceed **$1,500** per family. [1]  
However, **Urgent Care - Freestanding Outpatient Facility Services** is not subject to the deductible. Once the deductible is met, [2]  
The copay for **Urgent Care - Freestanding Outpatient Facility Services** services is **$30 per visit**. [2]  
The service applies to the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount of **$7,900**, not to exceed **$15,800** per family. When the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount is satisfied, the health plan will reimburse 100% of the allowed amount. [2][3]  

**Out-of-Network Provider**  
For out-of-network providers:  
An out-of-network provider has the right to bill for the balance. What this means is that the member may be responsible for the difference between the allowed amount and billed amount.  
the plan has a **$750** deductible per person, not to exceed **$1,500** per family. [1]  
**Urgent Care - Freestanding Outpatient Facility Services** is subject to this deductible. Once the deductible is met, [2]  
The coinsurance is **40%** of the allowed amount, and the plan will reimburse the remaining **60%** of the allowed amount for **Urgent Care - Freestanding Outpatient Facility Services**. [2]  
The service applies to the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount of **$7,900**, not to exceed **$15,800** per family. When the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount is satisfied, the health plan will reimburse 100% of the allowed amount. [2][3]  

---

### B) Urgent Care – Freestanding professional services (professional charges)
**In-Network Provider**  
For in-network providers:  
the plan has a **$750** deductible per person, not to exceed **$1,500** per family. [1]  
However, **Urgent Care - Freestanding Professional Services** is not subject to the deductible. [4]  
The copay for **Urgent Care - Freestanding Professional Services** services is **$30 per visit**. [4]  
The service applies to the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount of **$7,900**, not to exceed **$15,800** per family. When the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount is satisfied, the health plan will reimburse 100% of the allowed amount. [3][4]  

**Out-of-Network Provider**  
For out-of-network providers:  
An out-of-network provider has the right to bill for the balance. What this means is that the member may be responsible for the difference between the allowed amount and billed amount.  
the plan has a **$750** deductible per person, not to exceed **$1,500** per family. [1]  
**Urgent Care - Freestanding Professional Services** is subject to this deductible. Once the deductible is met, [4]  
The coinsurance is **40%** of the allowed amount, and the plan will reimburse the remaining **60%** of the allowed amount for **Urgent Care - Freestanding Professional Services**. [4]  
The service applies to the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount of **$7,900**, not to exceed **$15,800** per family. When the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount is satisfied, the health plan will reimburse 100% of the allowed amount. [3][4]  

---

### C) Urgent Care – Outpatient hospital facility only (hospital-based urgent care facility charges)
**In-Network Provider**  
For in-network providers:  
the plan has a **$750** deductible per person, not to exceed **$1,500** per family. [1]  
**Urgent Care - Outpatient Hospital Facility Only** is subject to this deductible. Once the deductible is met, [5]  
The copay for **Urgent Care - Outpatient Hospital Facility Only** services is **$250 per visit**. [5]  
The coinsurance is **20%** of the allowed amount, and the plan will reimburse the remaining **80%** of the allowed amount for **Urgent Care - Outpatient Hospital Facility Only**. [5]  
The service applies to the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount of **$7,900**, not to exceed **$15,800** per family. When the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount is satisfied, the health plan will reimburse 100% of the allowed amount. [3][5]  

**Out-of-Network Provider**  
For out-of-network providers:  
An out-of-network provider has the right to bill for the balance. What this means is that the member may be responsible for the difference between the allowed amount and billed amount.  
the plan has a **$750** deductible per person, not to exceed **$1,500** per family. [1]  
**Urgent Care - Outpatient Hospital Facility Only** is subject to this deductible. Once the deductible is met, [5]  
The copay for **Urgent Care - Outpatient Hospital Facility Only** services is **$250 per visit**. [5]  
The coinsurance is **20%** of the allowed amount, and the plan will reimburse the remaining **80%** of the allowed amount for **Urgent Care - Outpatient Hospital Facility Only**. [5]  
The service applies to the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount of **$7,900**, not to exceed **$15,800** per family. When the plan's out-of-pocket maximum amount is satisfied, the health plan will reimburse 100% of the allowed amount. [3][5]  

---
**Sources & Citations**
| Ref | Benefit/Service | Cost Share | Source |
|-----|-----------------|------------|--------|
| [1] | Medical Deductible (Participating Provider) | **$750 Individual / $1,500 Family** | planCostShares > (costShareType: "Medical Deductible") > providerCostShares (providerCostShareType: "Participating Provider") > coveredParties |
| [2] | Urgent Care – Freestanding Outpatient Facility Services | **In-Network: $30 per visit** / **OON: 40% coinsurance (deductible applies)** | eocCategories > Urgent Care Services > benefitSubCategories > Urgent Care > benefits > Freestanding outpatient facility > providerCostShares |
| [3] | OOP Maximum (Participating Provider) | **$7,900 Individual / $15,800 Family** | planCostShares > (costShareType: "OOP Maximum") > providerCostShares (providerCostShareType: "Participating Provider") > coveredParties |
| [4] | Urgent Care – Freestanding Professional Services | **In-Network: $30 per visit** / **OON: 40% coinsurance (deductible applies)** | eocCategories > Physician and other Professional Services > benefitSubCategories > In-office services > benefits > Urgent care services (Freestanding professional services) > providerCostShares |
| [5] | Urgent Care – Outpatient Hospital Facility Only | **$250 per visit + 20% coinsurance (deductible applies)** | eocCategories > Urgent Care Services > benefitSubCategories > Urgent Care > benefits > Hospital facility only > providerCostShares |
